summary: Frontend testing completed for notification dropdowns, demo courses visibility, course images, and course detail page. All features working correctly.

issues: Fixed: @apply with 'group' utility not supported in Tailwind - moved group class to JSX element directly

passed_tests: Admin dashboard notification bell button visible with badge showing unread count (2)
Admin notifications dropdown opens on click showing 4 notifications
Admin notifications include: 'New course available', 'Assignment due soon', 'Quiz completed', 'Welcome to GITB!'
Admin notifications 'View all notifications' button present
Student dashboard notification bell button visible with badge
Student notifications dropdown opens on click showing 4 notifications
Student notifications display same sample data as admin (MOCKED - hardcoded)
Demo courses visible in admin Courses page: Product Management, Data Analytics, Backend Engineering, Frontend Engineering
Additional courses visible: Music Marketing & Promotion, Digital Marketing, Venture Creation, Guidance and Counselling
School landing page loads with green theme (emerald gradient)
School hero section displays 'Africa's Best Innovative Online School' and 7,980+ learners served
School Schools section shows 5 school categories with images: Engineering, Data, Product, Creative Economy, Business
School All Programs page shows 9 course cards with images
Course cards display: title, description, duration, lessons count, application fee (€50)
Course detail page shows Overview tab with course title, department, duration, mode (Online)
Course detail page shows About the program section
Course detail page shows Admission Requirements: Educational Background, Work Experience, Language Proficiency, Assessment
Course detail page shows Course Outline with learning outcomes
Course detail page shows Costs section: Quarterly ($80), Upfront ($290 Popular), Monthly ($30)
Course detail page shows Career Outcome section: 'Become a certified professional'
Course detail page shows Scholarships section with 4 scholarships: Tech Foundation, Women in STEM, Creative Economy Grant, Early Bird
Course detail page shows Application form sidebar with €50 fee, name/email/phone fields
Course detail page shows Required Documents: High School Certificate, Means of Identification uploads
Course detail page shows 'Pay & Apply Now' button
critical_code_review_comments: Notifications are MOCKED/hardcoded in DashboardLayout.jsx (line 42-47) - not fetched from API
updated_files: /app/school/src/App.js - Added group class directly to school-card element
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Notification dropdowns work on both admin and student dashboards using data-testid='notifications-btn'. Sample notifications are hardcoded in DashboardLayout.jsx (not from API). 2) School app runs on port 3001 - fixed CSS issue with @apply group. 3) Demo courses (PM, DA, BE, FE) are visible in both admin courses list and school app. 4) Course detail page has all required sections: Overview, Admission Requirements, Course Outline, Costs, Career Outcomes, Scholarships. 5) Course cards on school app show images from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com.

admin_notification_dropdown.description: Bell icon opens dropdown with 4 sample notifications, badge shows unread count

student_notification_dropdown.description: Same notification dropdown works on student dashboard

demo_courses_visibility.description: Product Management, Data Analytics, Backend Engineering, Frontend Engineering all visible

course_images.description: 9 course cards with images displayed on All Programs page

course_detail_page.description: All 6 sections present: Overview, Admission Requirements, Course Outline, Costs, Career Outcome, Scholarships

mocked_features.notifications: Hardcoded sample data in DashboardLayout.jsx, not fetched from API
